title: unROM
description: A datapack that clears ROM of CC:Tweaked computers
body:
This datapack allows you to remove contents of ROM from CC:Tweaked computers!

`unrom.zip` clears `rom/*` and adds `rom/_` and `bios.lua` as stubs since CC:Tweaked computers cannot boot without files in ROM.

`unrom_nostub.zip` clears `rom/*` and doesn't add stubs. (Computers won't boot due to ROM mount error so you will have to add some files to `rom` with your custom datapack if you want computers to be useful)
